rationale: No conflict. Educ. Code §11.170 governs school district internal auditor selection and reporting structure, wholly unrelated to homestead exemption amounts under Tax Code §11.13(b).
quote:
Sec. 11.170. INTERNAL AUDITOR. If a school district employs an internal auditor:
(1) the board of trustees shall select the internal auditor; and
(2) the internal auditor shall report directly to the board.
_note: Rule text concerns internal auditor governance; no nexus to property tax homestead exemption amounts.
